programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.desc: Thomas Dillon asesinó a cinco amantes de la naturaleza al azar durante un periodo de tres años en el rural sur de Ohio. Después de una pista que guio al FBI al arma homicida, la prueba de balística arrojó una coincidencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Anchorage, Alaska, una madre joven y sus dos hijas fueron violadas y brutalmente asesinadas. Solo había una pieza de evidencia forense: una toalla con ladillas que el asesino usó para limpiarse después del crimen.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encontraron en la misma isla desierta y paradisíaca. Pero solo una de ellas salió con vida. Buck Walker y Stephanie Stearns llegaron a Hawái en el Sea Wind, el cual le pertenecía a la pareja desaparecida, Mac y Muff Graham.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 21 de junio de 1964, tres defensores de los derechos civiles, uno blanco y uno negro, desaparecieron de Misisipi mientras cruzaban el condado de Neshoba.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Vagaba por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York llevando solo piyamas y una bata de baño, pero el FBI estaba convencido de que Vince Gigante, el reputado jefe de la familia genovesa del crimen, no estaba loco.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Las violaciones y asesinatos de diez mujeres cerca de Tampa, Florida, en 1984, tenía desconcertadas a las autoridades y asustada a la comunidad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de cinco años de edad, Melissa Brannen, desapareció de una fiesta de Navidad en diciembre de 1989, el único sospechoso probable era Caleb Hughes, de 24 años.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attacks the U.S. treasury's printing plant, but its not money they're after. Cobra commander wants fort Knox's top-secret blueprints in order to stage the most incredible robbery of all time! That is, unless the Joes can stop this gold rush.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: Elvis: Part Two
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Cream's Disraeli Gears
programme.desc: Cream was rock's first true supergroup, combining the extraordinary talents of Eric Clapton, Ginger Baker and Jack Bruce in a power trio that set the template for hard rock during the 1970s.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Deep Purple's Machine Head
programme.desc: This classic album features the seminal song "Smoke on the Water," which brought worldwide superstardom to Deep Purple, putting them at the peak of hard rock.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Def Leppard's Hysteria
programme.desc: One of the most successful rock bands, Def Leppard was plagued by death and tragedy. The surviving members explain the making of their most successful album as they sort through the original tapes.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Duran Duran's Rio
programme.desc: A look at the behind-the-scenes creation of the iconic Duran Duran album "Rio," released in 1982.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elton John's Goodbye Yellow Brick Road
programme.desc: This is the story behind one of the most popular double-albums of all time: Elton John's "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road," featuring Candle in the Wind, Bennie and the Jets and the title track.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elvis Presley's Elvis Presley
programme.desc: This is the story behind Elvis's first album, which features performances from 1955 and 1956, interviews with the King and rare home movies of him at play and work.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Frank Zappa's Apostrophe/Over-Nite Sensation
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes film tells the story of the recording of Frank Zappa's solo album "Apostrophe (') and the Mothers of Invention's "Over-Nite Sensation."

programme.title: A Night With Lou Reed
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: A Lou Reed concert at the Bottom Line in New York City; 1983.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Dolly Parton
programme.desc: The legendary entertainer welcomes Larry King to her Nashville studio to discuss her new album, her enduring career, and her longtime support for the LGBTQ community. Plus, Dolly on reuniting with her 9 to 5 co-stars Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin.

programme.title: CMA Songwriters
programme.desc: Country artist Chris Janson performs hit singles 'Drunk Girl,' 'Fix a Drink' and 'Power of Positive Drinkin’.' The youngest member of the Grand Ole Opry, Janson boasts two No. 1 singles, as well as Music Row’s 'Song of the Year' award for 'Drunk Girl.'

programme.title: Queen: How They Broke Free

programme.title: A Cheetah's Pride

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The blonde manes of golden snub-nose monkeys; pink flamingo feathers brought on by an all-crustacean diet; the markings of gemsboks and cheetahs.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A gorilla wrestling match, pushy moose antlers, long pelican bills that snap at any enemy within range, and a megashark's stereo sniffer.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Sea lions throw their weight around to win a mate, Cape buffalo deliver knockout punches, Canada geese hit hard with their wings, and lionesses rule the Savanna with an iron paw.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Warthogs' lumpy armor, giant African bullfrogs' jumping and biting skills, wild turkeys' sharp beaks and razorlike spurs, and Nile crocodiles' powerful jaws.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A glacial stroll alongside a Galápagos tortoise; dancing with venomous European adders; a battle between Lacerta lizards; leopard seals' stealth attacks.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Chatty capuchin monkeys; Eurasian river otters' chilling screams; fruit bats' loud complaints; orcas' human-scale speech systems.

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: Find out what it takes to be the leader of a wolf, deer, rhino, or lion pack.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: The Hida Speedway has been completed and Lupin is looking to take top prize at the first race. The race is actually a trap designed by the Scorpion Gang who are intent on killing Lupin and eliminating all criminal competition.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko has stolen something from a man named Pycal, and he wants it back. Pycal is a magician who is able to shoot flames from his hands, walk on air, and deflect bullets with ease. Lupin goes up against Pycal in hopes of saving Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A boat collision ruins Lupin and Fujiko's quiet boating expedition. They discover a woman named Linda in the other boat just as gunmen on a larger boat attack them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko successfully pull off a heist; that is until Zenigata manages to shoot Lupin with a tranquilizer dart. Zenigata hauls Lupin off to jail. Despite Fujiko's best efforts, she cannot break Lupin out of prison.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/4/09: Giants' ageless lefty, Randy Johnson, 45, joins MLB's exclusive 300 win club by twirling six-innings of two-hit, one-run ball against the Nationals during the first game of a double-header, thus cementing his place in baseball history.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 2008 MLB All-Star Game at Yankee Stadium was marked as the longest All-Star Game in history. It ended after 4 hours and 50 minutes in the 15th inning on a walk-of sacrifice fly from Michael Young.

programme.title: Inside the Moments
programme.desc: On this episode of Inside the Moments, take a look at some of the icons that transcended the game of baseball, featuring Jackie Robinson, Satchel Paige, and more.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/2009: Andy Pettitte pitches into the 7th inning for the win in Game 6 of the 2009 American League Championship Series to lead the Yankees to a 5-2 victory over the Angels.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/29/10: Roy Halladay puts together a masterful performance against the Marlins, facing 27 batters and retiring them all in the 20th perfect game in MLB history.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Magic Sword
programme.desc: Sword-and-sorcery film about a prince rescuing a princess from an evil wizard.

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.desc: The crew pokes fun at another segment of a 1960s episode of General Hospital (1963) before watching an astronaut attempt to stop two planets from colliding with each other in Crash of the Moons.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch an early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital, before watching a movie made of several edited television episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000

programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Sigue el conflicto entre Igor y Arantxa, y también entre Abraham y Elettra por un bofetón de camino a casa donde la fiesta continúa. Mientras tanto uno de los mexicanos sufre un accidente que lo llevará directo al hospital

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras Esteban está en la habitación del amor dos de sus invitadas provocan un conflicto en la casa. Lo que en principio era una fiesta de risas y cachondeo se convierte en una guerra donde el joven acabará perdiendo los estribos

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Cuando todo era paz y armonía la llegada de la Boss, hará poner las pilas a los chicos antes de que vayan a pasar un día de campo. Con los chicos cansados de pasar un día en el campo llega una nueva fuente de energía, Potro vuelve al grupo

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después del encontronazo viene la pelea y así es como comienza el capítulo. Todos los chicos intentan mediar en la pelea, pero entre ellas ya no se toleran y no dudarán en utilizar todas sus armas para conseguir dañar a su oponente

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¿Seguirán juntos, Igor y Arantxa?, ¿Qué ocurrirá entre Jawy y Elettra?, y cómo será la última noche de los chicos en Madrid? Fiesta, amor, celos y lágrimas estarán presentes en el último capítulo de Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos ven por primera vez su verano y reaccionan aquellos momentos vividos tanto en Mykonos, Madrid y Barcelona

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos de Súper Shore se reúnen para revivir y ver por primera vez los momentos más importantes del verano y lo que eso conlleva, descubrirán muchos hechos que quizá nos les haga mucha gracia

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Estructuras enormes

programme.desc: Rick visita una galería de arte en el Hotel Venetian para ver las ilustraciones carísimas del clásico libro para niños "Donde viven los monstruos". Mientras tanto, en Gold & Silver, aparece una colección extraordinaria de discos de vinilo de los Beatles.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick cree que vale la pena comprar la primera moneda estadounidense, pero le va a costar una gran cantidad de dinero. Corey y Chum le ven futuro a una lonchera antigua de la serie animada "Los supersónicos" que llega deslizándose por el mostrador.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: Estructuras enormes

programme.title: Estructuras enormes

programme.title: Estructuras enormes
programme.desc: La humanidad ha demostrado una y otra vez que son más que capaces de soñar en grande. La feroz ambición ha producido tanto monumentos de renombre mundial como errores monumentales.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick visita una galería de arte en el Hotel Venetian para ver las ilustraciones carísimas del clásico libro para niños "Donde viven los monstruos". Mientras tanto, en Gold & Silver, aparece una colección extraordinaria de discos de vinilo de los Beatles.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick cree que vale la pena comprar la primera moneda estadounidense, pero le va a costar una gran cantidad de dinero. Corey y Chum le ven futuro a una lonchera antigua de la serie animada "Los supersónicos" que llega deslizándose por el mostrador.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: Los secretos de una Australia salvaje
programme.desc: Los cocodrilos son los reptiles vivos más grandes de la Tierra y se encuentran entre los animales más peligrosos de Australia. En los últimos años, su número ha aumentado y están prosperando como hábiles cazadores.

programme.title: Los secretos de una Australia salvaje
programme.desc: Si bien todos los famosos marsupiales de Australia comparten similitudes, son algunas de las especies más pequeñas y raras las que resaltan sus individualidades. Comprende la vida como un mini marsupial mientras vives junto a los quokkas y los quolls.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next, Teresa has no idea her boyfriend is having an ongoing affair!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Roger has been sleeping with his girlfriend's mother and her aunt too. Next Jeff brought the Springer Cam along to help him bust his wife, Dee Dee. Later Brenda is here to tell her lover's wife that she's about to lose her husband!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to a little help from what appears to be a mermaid, the Straw Hats find themselves reunited aboard an escape vessel, but the fate of Luffy and the Franky Family is yet to be determined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes his body to the breaking point in his battle with Lucci, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to fight off a fleet of Marines until their captain returns – if he ever does.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy lies battered and badly beaten, but Usopp’s desperate pleas inspire the rubber-man to mount one final, furious attack on Rob Lucci!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their leader crippled by exhaustion and their escape ship destroyed, the Straw Hats find themselves with only one treacherous option: throwing themselves into the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are rescued by the unexpected arrival of a dear old friend, but they’ll have to avoid a barrage of deadly cannonballs in order to survive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats bid a tearful farewell to the brave little ship that was their home for so very many adventures. Rest in peace, Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats get some much needed rest and relaxation, Franky makes a big announcement, and Vice Admiral Garp tracks down his grandson!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s friends are shocked to learn that his grandpa is a marine hero, but that’s nothing compared to how surprised they’ll be by his father’s true identity!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy gets the chance to catch up with his old friend Coby, Nami does some serious snooping, and Robin is paid a chilling visit from a terrifying face from her past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shanks visits Whitebeard with a serious request, Franky and Iceberg begin construction on a ship for the Straw Hats, and news spreads of the events at Enies Lobby.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Chopper risk their lives to help a heartbroken young girl track down her long lost pet!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro’s day takes a turn for the crazy when his search for a new sword is derailed by a couple of meddling orphans!

programme.desc: Discover Magnus's role in a turning point of World War II history.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A colleague vanishes amid unexplained disappearances in Normandy, France, where Magnus and her team run into a military blockade during their investigation.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When a deadly weapon bioengineered by the Taelons is stolen from their research lab, Commander William Boone (Kevin Kilner) must find the scientist (Jonathan Potts) behind the theft before disaster occurs.

programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for typical vehicle repossession...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery join the team as op Kev is tasked with rescuing a 45 tonne mobile crane. In London Merrie rescues a truck on a narrow road between train lines. Abang performs a risky rescue of a van and trailer. We catch up with ex driver Rory.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In the North East at Alpha Recovery, Kevin is faced with a real challenge. Crouch driver Abang has to save a sportscar that's gone off the road. Lanterns Merrie has a surprise for a Trucking Hell superfan and Aidan is faced with a busted bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: An Artic has come off the carriageway so Crouch sends in the big hitters. Alphas Aidan is with a bus which has stopped near a school. Merrie must risk life and limb to rescue a coach and Lantern op Sean dices with death on a notorious road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On the Moors, a 50 ton construction machine has and landed in a stream. The team at Alpha face a dangerous two-day rescue. On The M1, Lantern's Bohdan rescues a stranded 44-ton artic and Stuart is called to the A34 to rescue a broken-down bus.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: In this riotous spin on the mismatched buddy movie, an uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the gregarious widow (Sofía Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen!

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Now a rising lawyer, Elle Woods is about to make partner at her firm, she and Emmett are still in love, and her hair is still healthy. Elle heads to D.C. and takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and Betsy Jobs and Arlene Lorenzo just want to have a good time. But during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Clerks II
programme.desc: A calamity at Dante and Randall's shops sends them looking for new horizons, but they ultimately settle at Mooby's, a fictional Disney-McDonald's-style fast-food empire. Sequel to the 1994 film by Kevin Smith.

programme.title: Clerks III
programme.desc: Following a massive heart attack, Randal enlists his friends and fellow clerks Dante, Elias, Jay, and Silent Bob to make a movie immortalizing his life at the convenience store that started it all.

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: The creators and star of Borat bring you the hilarious comedy about what happens when the world's worst dictator is stuck in New York.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Chemical assassin and Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein goes head-to-head with Cambodian communist leader Pol Pot, whose Khmer Rouge troops filled Cambodia's killing fields with millions of innocent victims.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Mongolia shows how devastating its climate can be as a monstrous storm assails the remaining survivalists. The participants are forced into their shelters and can only hope they'll hold up to the storm.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Seven remaining survivalists are pushed to their limits as the weather worsens in Mongolia. One participant turns to tree bark for sustenance while another questions his ability to continue killing for food.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After a severe round of testing, the two remaining smiths have only four days in their home forges to recreate one of Japan's deadliest swords: the Nagamaki.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths aim for the stars when they are tasked with forging fantasy blades from a meteorite. Forced to use the canister method, the smiths battle difficult forge welds in order to create their one of a kind blades.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths fight fire with fire when they must dismantle a forge and use that steel to construct a blade. The competition gets heated as the smiths struggle to salvage enough material to create a san mai billet.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths face triple the challenges when they must forge a canister Damascus blade from three different steels using three separate cans.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are dispatched to the snowy winter tundra to forge a kukri with steel harvested from an old snowmobile. Provided with no power tools, the smiths might fight to forge their blades with just hand tools and the dreaded coal forge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls head to Bergdorff’s in New York City for makeovers! After receiving their new looks, the girls do their first photo session with Nigel Barker and must light themselves up.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn runway etiquette with Miss J and walk the runway in a Jill Stuart fashion show. Two previous Top Model contestants surprise the girls and offer runway advice.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Nicki Minaj guest judges the new cast of queens competing for $100,000 and the title of America's Next Drag Superstar. The first step toward the crown is having to write and perform an original rap number.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: In the second season premiere, the queens must write and perform a Fosse-inspired jazz number. Thandie Newton (Westworld) and Swedish singer Robyn guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens' creativity comes to life when they compete in a pageant of sports-inspired couture, and strutting the runway in three 'ball-themed' looks. Leslie Jones (Saturday Night Live) guest judges.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a teenage girl who disappeared after trying to dodge the advances of an aggressive boy. Meanwhile, Samantha's estranged sister attempts to reconnect with her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Samantha secretly searches for her missing sister, Emily, with only the aid of the local police. But when Jack finds out about Emily's abduction, he insists that the team get involved.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In the fifth season finale, the team searches for a missing 13-year-old girl whose mother fears she fell prey to a fierce neighborhood drug dealer.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members search for a woman who disappeared after the police killed her boyfriend. They wonder if the missing woman's brother, a drug dealer and violent gang leader, is connected to the abduction.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When an ultimate fighter disappears after winning a match, the team discovers he knew a lot of people that could have been responsible for his abduction. One suspect is a childhood enemy who was recently released from prison.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a man is killed by an explosive package shipped to his home, the team attempts to capture the sender and intercept his latest deadly parcel.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When five prominent men are killed at a trendy New York City restaurant, the team's investigation brings them into contact with a lieutenant in Antonia Vargas' cartel, triggering a long-awaited showdown between Isobel and Vargas.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team hunts for a serial killer who is targeting young,homeless men. Tiffany and Scola don't see eye to eye on how to handle the case or the difference between partners.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a young girl is kidnapped from her daycare, the team must help her parents navigate a debt owed to the deadly gang in their neighborhood. Also, Maggie struggles to focus on the case when her sister, Erin, returns from rehab.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie goes undercover working in a bar to investigate an anti-government group that regularly gathers there and has several members suspected in a series of bombings.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team realizes they have a cross-country serial killer on their hands, after another body is found bound with the same knot as their local victim. Also, the case has ties to Isobel's father, Robert, leading to revelations about their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered in a New York City park after returning from vacation, the team searches for a suspect linked to the drug trade. Also, Scola turns over a new leaf when it comes to his relationships.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: OA is forced to confront one of his biggest fears when the team discovers that deadly sarin gas may have been sold to terrorists.

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: After her ex-husband Carlos shoots Celeste three times in the gut, it's time to play dirty. In the fight for her godson, Rob, she hires three outlawed and redneck brothers to bring him back to her.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: Mimic 3: Sentinel
programme.desc: In the third creature feature in the MIMIC franchise, the bugs are back. After a group of people begin to disappear, a man hypersensitive to germs and confined to a protective bubble, decides to play detective.

programme.title: Fargo

programme.title: Thelma & Louise
programme.desc: In one of the greatest road movies of all time, Geena Davis and Susan Sarandon ride to everlasting fame as two women who embark on a crime spree across the American southwest.

programme.title: Kalifornia

programme.title: Good Will Hunting

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A un hombre enojado le cuesta aceptar la verdad. Los oficiales cuestionan a unas personas reservadas queriendo confirmar sus sospechas. Papá y mamá se ponen violentos y los niños llaman a la policía.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado se queja de dolor en el pecho después de golpear a un conductor. Una mujer se enoja por una bolsa de papas picante. Un hombre violento por fin aprende cual es el límite de su novia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Supuestos ladrones de joyas intentan escapar durante una persecución a alta velocidad. El arresto de un hombre peleonero es un reto. Hay pelea matrimonial cuando una parada revela artículos ilegales.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un fugitivo desesperadamente decide huir a pie. Una novia sobreprotectora duda de la policía y la esposan. Un celoso pierde a la novia y más después de buscar pleito con el hijo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre de delito reincidente lleva a la policía por un camino rugoso. Un oficial aconseja a dos adolescentes en un auto estacionado. Unos oficiales le cuentan el secreto a una mujer de su hermano.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a pie termina con el sospechoso en una situación vergonzosa. Un automovilista llama a la policía cuando un peatón pierde la calma. Un hombre arriesga su relación con malas manías.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se enoja cuando se le interroga. Durante una persecución a coche un hombre le habla a su esposa y la policía se sorprende. Un mentiroso es atrapado y se le da una prueba de inocencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Con la policía en los talones, el mundo se le cierra a un sospechoso. Una mujer llorando por su esposo violento llama a la policía. Durante un retén alguien intenta escapar de la policía y su pasado.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Alternate reality versions of Carter (Amanda Tapping) and Kawalsky (Jay Acovone) are found in Area 51. Brought to Stargate Command, they start to deteriorate. However, return to their own reality means death, as their world was invaded by Goa'uld!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is captured by Aris Boch, a bounty hunter chasing an evil Goa'uld named Kel'tar. He offers them freedom in exchange for their help. They agree, only to find that Kel'tar is, in fact, a Tok'ra, whose capture would endanger countless others.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On another one of their quests, SG-1 encounters a medieval civilization and frees a woman tied to a stake as a sacrifice to a demon. When the woman is freed, the demon vows to destroy the village unless the SG-1 team is offered up in appeasement.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 lands in the middle of a blazing battle between some Stargate soldiers and a Jaffa army. Believing the soldiers to be the missing-in-action SG-11 team, O'Neill and the others provide assistance… until the mystery team turns its weapons on SG-1!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue of captured Abydonians, Daniel finds his missing wife, Sha're. But instead of greeting him, she attacks him - leading to her death at the hands of Teal'c. Distraught over her death and angry at Teal'c, Daniel quits Stargate Command.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters an entire planet suffering from amnesia. The planet's leader, a woman named Ke'ra, returns to Earth with SG-1 to find a cure. But as Ke'ra and Daniel develop a mutual attraction, SG-1 suspects she may not be who she appears to be.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter's father has been captured on a moon transformed into hell. No one but Jolinar has ever escaped from hell, so Tok'ra technology is used to access Jolinar's memories from Carter's mind…but not before an old foe shows up to foil the mission!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue attempt, SG-1 is caught by one of hell's denizens, who is determined to use the information they have to overthrow Goa'uld lord Sokar. Using Tok'ra technology, the team is forced to relive painful memories…but how much can they take?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During routine medical exams, Dr. Fraiser injects each team member with a sedative. Teal'c awakens and sees General Hammond conspiring with Fraiser and two aliens. What has happened at Stargate Command, and can SG-1 overpower its own allies?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is invited to planet Tollan to attend a Triad ceremony, they are shocked to discover it is actually a trial to determine the fate of their friend Skaara. Daniel and O'Neill must argue a case against a mysterious Goa'uld to save Skaara.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: En route to a planet, the SG-1 are implanted with an alien spore that evolves into a being called Urgo. Though Urgo claims to be friendly, the suspicious team members work feverishly to rid themselves of the creature before it destroys their minds.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits the friendly planet Edora and gathers to watch the annual meteor shower that lights up the sky like a fiery rain. But suddenly, wayward asteroids bombard the planet, destroying the Stargate. Can O'Neill and the team ever return home?

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When the mythic Gods, the Titans, are released and kill all the elders, Leo is forced to take over. Meanwhile, a mysterious Whitelighter from the future guides the Charmed Ones when Leo gives the girls the ultimate power to vanquish the Titans.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Cleaners kidnap Wyatt and erase his existence, after the child accidentally brings a dragon to life. When Piper, Phoebe and Paige regain their memories they relive the day Wyatt was kidnapped.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When three evil sisters magically steal the Charmed Ones' identities and powers, Piper, Phoebe and Paige must convince Chris that they are the real Charmed Ones in order to get their lives back.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While on a temp job, Paige meets an attractive male witch named Richard and wants to help end the magical feud between his and another magical family.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Halliwell sisters attempt to escape magical alternate realities where their secret desires come true, after Chris uses the demon Gith to try to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In an attempt to save her boss' soul, Paige goes behind her sisters backs and makes a deal with a demon. Meanwhile, Piper learns that Wyatt has been sabotaging her dates.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones are called upon by The Lady of the Lake to help protect Excalibur, the legendary Sword in the Stone. Numerous magical beings arrive at the manor to try their hand at pulling the sword from the stone.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After vanquishing a Manticore demon, Piper, Phoebe and Paige become foster parents to its orphaned half-breed infant but upon Chris' plea to vanquish the child, they believe that by raising the child with love they can change its destiny.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Bianca, a woman from the future, arrives to take Chris' powers, and Leo learns that she is actually part of an assassin family of witches.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige finds herself transported back in time to an era of free love and free magic, where she discovers Grams, a peace-loving hippie, who is on a crusade to rid the world of evil through the magical power of love.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper vanquishes a demon from Wyatt's room, she has an epiphany about the rest of her life concerning Wyatt. Unable to handle Piper's revelation, Paige and Phoebe decide to remind Piper of the importance of love by conjuring up a 'Mr. Right.'

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Jason breaks up with Phoebe when he finally learns her and her sisters are really witches. Meanwhile, Richard attempts to free himself of his family's karma, and Piper and Paige try to vanquish a group of Swarm demons.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones help out Leo's mentor, Gideon, when he wants to find out who cast the spell of darkness over a magic school and conjured the Headless Horseman who has been beheading the teachers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe frees a genie from a bottle, she soon finds that she must take the genie's place. Meanwhile, anxious to put Leo and Piper back together, Chris uses Phoebe to make his wish come true, but she takes his instructions too literally.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: Survivor
